Question: How do I change my billing address?
Answer: Go to Settings > Billing and update your address details.

Answer: We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and PayPal.

Answer: You can reach our support team 24/7 by emailing support@example.com.

Answer: Yes! You can toggle dark mode using the theme button in the top right corner.

Question: How do I track my order?
Answer: Once your order ships, you will receive a tracking link via email.

Answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time from your Account Settings.

Question: What is the confidence threshold?
Answer: It determines how strict the AI is when matching your question to an FAQ. A higher threshold means it requires a closer match.
